title: Refactor incrementally
body: Never rewrite a working system from scratch. Improve it piece by piece. When you touch a file for a feature, leave it cleaner than you found it (the Boy Scout Rule). Extract one function, rename one variable, add one test.
code:
# The Boy Scout Rule in practice:
# You are adding a feature to UserProfile.tsx.
# While you are there, you notice:
#   - A variable named 'd' that should be 'daysUntilExpiry'
#   - A duplicated validation function
#   - No test file exists
#
# Fix the naming and duplication as part of your feature PR.
# Create the test file with tests for your new feature.
# Do NOT rewrite the entire component -- just leave it better.
